name: Model.load
desc: Load a GGUF model from disk.

name: Model.load_splits
desc: Load a sharded GGUF model from multiple files.

name: Model.load_from_fd
desc: Load a model from an already-open FILE* handle.  The caller owns the file - i...

name: Model.fit_params
desc: Auto-fit model and context parameters to available device VRAM.

name: Model:ptr
desc: Return the raw llama_model*.

name: Model:free
desc: Explicitly free the model and release VRAM immediately. After free(), this ob...

name: Model:save
desc: Save the model to a GGUF file. Useful after applying quantization or merging ...

name: M.size
desc: Total size of all model tensors in bytes.

name: M.n_params
desc: Total number of parameters.

name: M.n_ctx_train
desc: Training context size.

name: M.n_embd
desc: Hidden embedding dimension.

name: M.n_embd_inp
desc: Input embedding dimension.

name: M.n_embd_out
desc: Output embedding dimension.

name: M.n_layer
desc: Number of transformer layers.

name: M.n_head
desc: Number of attention heads.

name: M.n_head_kv
desc: Number of KV heads (GQA).

name: M.n_swa
desc: Sliding window attention size.

name: M.has_encoder
desc: Returns true if encoder-decoder model.

name: M.has_decoder
desc: Returns true for decoder models (virtually all LLMs).

name: M.is_recurrent
desc: Returns true for recurrent models (Mamba, RWKV).

name: M.is_hybrid
desc: Returns true for hybrid attention+SSM models (Jamba).

name: M.is_diffusion
desc: Returns true for diffusion-based models (LLaDA).

name: M.rope_freq_scale_train
desc: RoPE frequency scale from training.

name: M.n_cls_out
desc: Number of classifier output classes.

name: M.cls_label
desc: Label of classifier output class at index i.

name: M.rope_type
desc: RoPE type: "none" | "norm" | "neox" | "mrope" | "imrope" | "vision"

name: M.decoder_start_token
desc: Decoder start token for encoder-decoder models (-1 for decoder-only).

name: M.info
desc: Return a summary table of model properties.

name: M.meta
desc: Get a GGUF metadata value by key name.

name: M.meta_val
desc: Alias for meta().

name: M.meta_all
desc: Return all GGUF metadata as a Lua table { key = value, ... }.

name: M.chat_template
desc: Get the model's built-in Jinja2 chat template string.

name: M.load_lora
desc: Load a LoRA adapter from a GGUF file.

name: M.lora_load
desc: Alias for load_lora() (backwards compatibility).

name: M.apply_lora
desc: Apply a LoRA adapter to a context.

name: M.remove_lora
desc: Remove all LoRA adapters from a context.

name: M.quantize
desc: Quantize a model file and save the result.

name: M.vocab
desc: Return the Vocab handle for this model. Created once and cached.

name: M.context
desc: Create an inference context for text generation.

name: M.embedding_context
desc: Create an embedding context (CPU, pooling enabled, no logits).

name: Context.new

name: Context:ptr
desc: Return the raw llama_context* (for passing to sampler:sample() etc.).

name: Context:free
desc: Explicitly free the context and release VRAM immediately. Normally handled by...

name: Context:set_n_threads
desc: Dynamically change thread counts without recreating the context.

name: Context:set_embeddings
desc: Toggle embedding extraction mode.

name: Context:set_causal_attn
desc: Toggle causal attention (false = bidirectional, for embedding models).

name: Context:set_warmup
desc: Enable/disable warmup mode (skips perf counters during warmup pass).

name: Context:synchronize
desc: Synchronize GPU operations (wait for all async GPU work to complete).

name: Context:memory_breakdown
desc: Print a detailed memory breakdown to stderr (debugging).

name: Context:set_abort_callback
desc: Register an abort callback (called periodically during decode). Return true f...

name: M.decode
desc: Decode a sequence of tokens and update the KV cache.  Uses the pre-allocated ...

name: M.decode_multi
desc: Decode multiple tokens with ALL logits enabled (for speculative verification)...

name: M.decode_single
desc: Decode a single token (tight generation loop path).  Uses the pre-allocated b...

name: M.encode
desc: Encode a sequence (for encoder-decoder models: T5, BART, etc.).

name: M.kv_can_shift
desc: Check whether the KV cache supports position shifting. Returns false for recu...

name: M.kv_seq_pos_min
desc: Return the smallest KV position for a sequence (-1 if empty).

name: M.kv_seq_pos_max
desc: Return the largest KV position for a sequence (-1 if empty).

name: M.kv_seq_div
desc: Divide all positions in [p0, p1) for seq_id by d (context compression).

name: M.kv_clear
desc: Clear the entire KV cache and reset n_past to 0.

name: M.kv_seq_rm
desc: Remove KV entries for seq_id in [p0, p1). p1 = -1 means to end.

name: M.kv_seq_cp
desc: Copy KV entries from src to dst for positions in [p0, p1).

name: M.kv_seq_keep
desc: Keep only seq_id; discard all other sequences from the KV cache.

name: M.kv_seq_shift
desc: Add delta to all positions in [p0, p1) for seq_id (sliding window shift). Onl...

name: M.memory_seq_add
desc: Add delta to positions in [p0, p1) for seq_id (canonical name for kv_seq_shift).

name: M.save_state
desc: Save the full context state to a file (KV cache + RNG state).

name: M.load_state
desc: Restore full context state from a file saved via save_state().

name: M.snapshot
desc: Serialise the full state to an in-memory Lua string (no filesystem I/O).

name: M.restore
desc: Restore state from a snapshot string produced by snapshot().

name: M.seq_state_size
desc: Return the byte size of the KV state for a single sequence.

name: M.seq_save_state
desc: Save the KV state for a single sequence to a file.

name: M.seq_load_state
desc: Load the KV state for a single sequence from a file.

name: M.seq_snapshot
desc: Serialise the KV state for a single sequence to a Lua string (no I/O).

name: M.seq_restore
desc: Restore the KV state for a single sequence from a blob produced by seq_snapsh...

name: M.logits
desc: Return the raw logit array for batch position idx.

name: M.logprob
desc: Compute log-probability of token_id at batch position idx. Delegates to C (io...

name: M.entropy
desc: Compute Shannon entropy of the logit distribution at batch position idx.

name: M.sampled_token
desc: Get the sampled token at batch position i (after decode + sampler:sample()).

name: M.sampled_probs
desc: Return the probability array for the sampled token at position i.

name: M.sampled_probs_count
desc: Return the count of probabilities in sampled_probs(i).

name: M.sampled_logits
desc: Return the logit array for the sampled candidates at position i.

name: M.sampled_logits_count
desc: Return the count of logits in sampled_logits(i).

name: M.sampled_candidates
desc: Return the candidate token array at position i.

name: M.sampled_candidates_count
desc: Return the count of candidates in sampled_candidates(i).

name: M.embedding_ptr
desc: Return the raw embedding pointer for a sequence (zero-copy). Caller must not ...

name: M.embedding
desc: Return the pooled embedding as a Lua table (copies floats from C).

name: M.set_control_vector
desc: Apply a control vector (activation steering) to this context. Takes effect on...

name: M.clear_control_vector
desc: Clear any active control vector.

name: M.set_sampler
desc: Assign a sampler to a specific sequence. [EXPERIMENTAL] When set, llama_decod...

name: M.attach_threadpool
desc: Attach a custom threadpool to this context.

name: M.detach_threadpool
desc: Detach the current threadpool (reverts to internal auto-managed pool).

name: M.perf_print
desc: Print performance counters to stderr.

name: M.perf_reset
desc: Reset performance counters.

name: M.perf
desc: Return performance data as a Lua table.

name: Vocab:tokenize
desc: Tokenize a text string.

name: Vocab:detokenize
desc: Detokenize a sequence of tokens back into text.

name: Vocab:piece
desc: Convert a single token to its text piece.

name: Vocab:text
desc: Get the raw text representation of a token (without lstrip behavior).

name: Vocab:is_eog
desc: Check whether a token is an end-of-generation token.

name: Vocab:fim_suf
desc: Fill-in-the-Middle suffix token ID. Returns -1 if unsupported.

name: Vocab:fim_mid
desc: Fill-in-the-Middle middle token ID. Returns -1 if unsupported.

name: Vocab:fim_pad
desc: Fill-in-the-Middle pad token ID. Returns -1 if unsupported.

name: Vocab:fim_rep
desc: Fill-in-the-Middle repo token ID. Returns -1 if unsupported.

name: Vocab:fim_sep
desc: Fill-in-the-Middle separator token ID. Returns -1 if unsupported.

name: Vocab:get_add_bos
desc: Returns true if the model vocabulary adds a BOS token automatically.

name: Vocab:get_add_eos
desc: Returns true if the model vocabulary adds an EOS token automatically.

name: Vocab:n_tokens
desc: Alias: n_tokens() = n_vocab()

name: Vocab:cls
desc: CLS token ID. CLS == BOS in llama.cpp (llama_vocab_cls is deprecated).

name: Vocab:score
desc: Get the float score of a token (used in Unigram/SPM tokenizers).

name: Vocab:attr
desc: Get the attribute flags of a token. Returns a bitmask of LLAMA_TOKEN_ATTR_* v...

name: Vocab:is_control
desc: Returns true if a token is a control token.

name: Vocab:builtin_templates
desc: List the names of all built-in chat templates available in llama.cpp.

name: Vocab:apply_template
desc: Apply the model's Jinja2 chat template to a list of messages.

desc: Returns true if the model's template supports enable_thinking. (Qwen3/3.5, De...
